Name: Abbreviations expander
Description: Easily create abbreviations that will be expanded after hitting `Space`.

Name: Advanced URI
Description: Advanced modes for Obsidian URI

Name: Atomizer
Description: Turn any text into insightful atomic notes.

Name: Automatic Table Of Contents
Description: Create a table of contents in a note, that updates itself when the note changes

Name: Ayanite
Description: Advanced AI chat interface and knowledge copilot for professionals. Turn Obsidian into an Integrated Knowledge Environment. Supports Ollama and cloud GPT providers. (Closed source)

Name: Better Math in Callouts & Blockquotes
Description: Add better Live Preview support for math rendering inside callouts & blockquotes.

Name: BRAT
Description: Easily install a beta version of a plugin for testing.

Name: Buttons
Description: Create Buttons in your Obsidian notes to run commands, open links, and insert templates

Name: Claudian
Description: Embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault. Your vault becomes Claude's working directory, giving it full agentic capabilities: file read/write, search, bash commands, and multi-step workflows.

Name: Commander
Description: Customize your workspace by adding commands everywhere, create Macros and supercharge your mobile toolbar.

Name: Copilot
Description: Your AI Copilot: Chat with Your Second Brain, Learn Faster, Work Smarter.

Name: Dataview
Description: Complex data views for the data-obsessed.

Name: Edge TTS
Description: Read notes aloud using Microsoft Edge Read Aloud API (free, high quality text-to-speech).

Name: Epistemic Tagger
Description: Classify text selections with epistemic types and store in PostgreSQL. Supports multiple bundle profiles for different contexts.

Name: Excalidraw
Description: Sketch Your Mind. An Obsidian plugin to edit and view Excalidraw drawings. Enter the world of 4D Visual PKM.

Name: Folder Filelist
Description: Create and maintain a list of wikilinks to files in specified folders

Name: Folders to Graph
Description: Display your vault folder structure into your graphs.

Name: Graph Banner
Description: Display a local graph view to the note header

Name: Iconize
Description: Add icons to anything you desire in Obsidian, including files, folders, and text.

Name: Just Share Please
Description: Quickly and easily share individual notes online using an anonymized link. Also easy to self-host!

Name: Link Converter
Description: Scan all your links in the vault and convert them to your desired format.

Name: Local REST API
Description: Get, change or otherwise interact with your notes in Obsidian via a REST API.

Name: Longform
Description: Write novels, screenplays, and other long projects in Obsidian.

Name: Note Definitions
Description: Personal dictionary for your notes

Name: Notemd
Description: Enhances notes using LLMs: 1) Processes text to add [[wiki-links]] and create concept notes. 2) Performs web research (Tavily/DuckDuckGo) and summarizes topics. 3) Generates content from note titles. 4) Translates notes/selections. 5) build powerful knowledge graphs Supports multiple LLM providers and customizable output.

Name: Recent Files
Description: List files by most recently opened

Name: Semantic AI
Description: AI-enhanced semantic plugin with academic-level tagging, visual flow graphs, and metadata management. Supports axioms, claims, evidence bundles, relationships, and more.

Name: Smart Connections
Description: Chat with your notes & see links to related content with Local or Remote models.

Name: Structured Copy: Files & Folders
Description: Easily copy the contents of files and folders in a structured JSON format.

Name: Style Settings
Description: Offers controls for adjusting theme, plugin, and snippet CSS variables.

Name: Symlink Creator
Description: Create symlinks to files and folders inside and outside of your vault.

Name: Table of Contents
Description: Create a table of contents for a note.

Name: Templater
Description: Create and use templates

Name: Waypoint
Description: Easily generate dynamic content maps in your folder notes using waypoints. Enables folders to show up in the graph view and removes the need for messy tags!

Name: Webpage HTML Export
Description: Export html from single files, canvas pages, or whole vaults. Direct access to the exported HTML files allows you to publish your digital garden anywhere. Focuses on flexibility, features, and style parity.
